info.title: Colophony API
info.description:
REST API for Colophony, the open-source infrastructure suite for literary magazines. Covers submission intake, review pipelines, file management, and organization administration.

## Authentication

All endpoints require authentication via one of:
- **Bearer token** — Zitadel OIDC access token in the `Authorization` header
- **API key** — Organization-scoped key in the `X-Api-Key` header

Most endpoints also require the `X-Organization-Id` header to set the organization context.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Manage organizations and their members. Organizations are the top-level tenant in Colophony.

tags.name: Manuscripts
tags.description: Manage manuscripts — personal library of creative works with versioning.

tags.name: Submissions
tags.description: Create, review, and manage literary submissions through the editorial workflow.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: List, download, and delete files attached to submissions. Uploads use the tus protocol.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User profile and account information. User lifecycle is managed via Zitadel.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Create and manage organization-scoped API keys for programmatic access.

tags.name: Forms
tags.description: Create and manage dynamic form definitions for submission intake. Forms define the fields submitters fill out.

tags.name: Periods
tags.description: Manage submission periods — time windows during which submissions are accepted.

tags.name: Publications
tags.description: Manage publications — named publishing venues within an organization (Slate pipeline).

tags.name: Pipeline
tags.description: Manage the post-acceptance publication pipeline — copyedit, proofread, and publish workflow (Slate).

tags.name: Contract Templates
tags.description: Manage contract templates with merge field placeholders for generating contracts (Slate).

tags.name: Contracts
tags.description: Generate, send, and manage contracts for pipeline items (Slate).

tags.name: Issues
tags.description: Assemble and manage publication issues — collections of pipeline items (Slate).

tags.name: CMS Connections
tags.description: Manage CMS connections for publishing issues to WordPress or Ghost (Slate).

tags.name: Audit
tags.description: Query the audit log for security and compliance. Admin-only.

get.description: Returns all organizations the authenticated user is a member of.

post.description: Create a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the first ADMIN member.

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier (3-63 chars, lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens)

get.description: Check whether a slug is available for use when creating an organization.
Retrieve a single organization by its ID.

patch.description: Update an organization's name or settings. Requires ADMIN role.

delete.description: Permanently delete an organization and all its data. Requires ADMIN role. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of members for the specified organization.

total.description: Total number of items across all pages

post.description: Invite a user to the organization by email. The user must already have an account. Requires ADMIN role.

email.description: Email address of the user to invite

role.description: Role to assign to the new member

updatedAt.description: When the membership was last updated

delete.description: Remove a member from the organization. Requires ADMIN role.

patch.description: Change a member's role within the organization. Requires ADMIN role.

updatedAt.description: When the membership was last updated
